analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of unit.co/docs covered 349 pages with 100% crawl coverage and 91.5% overall confidence. Critical gaps identified: API reference coverage at only 3.5% despite 243 API pages detected, example reliability at 29.75%, and freshness metadata present on just 12.03% of pages. Site contains 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links. SEO/geo issues affect 9.53% of pages.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage: 349 of 357 pages successfully crawled (100%)
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95%)
Zero repository navigation broken links; all 2 broken links are user-facing docs
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
No crawl traps detected across 357 URLs examined
risks: Critical: API reference coverage at 3.5% leaves 96.5% of 243 API pages without usage documentation
High: Example reliability at 29.75% indicates 70%+ of code examples may be outdated or non-functional
High: Freshness metadata missing on 87.97% of pages prevents users from assessing content currency
Medium: 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation experience
Medium: SEO/geo issues on 9.53% of pages may impact discoverability and international reach
Low: API detection confidence at 85% suggests possible undercounted API surface area
Low: 4 excluded links may hide additional broken link issues

prioritized_actions.action: Implement systematic API usage examples and integration guides for the 243 detected API pages to raise coverage from 3.5% to minimum 60%
Establish automated example testing pipeline to validate code samples and improve reliability from 29.75% baseline
Add last-updated timestamps to all documentation pages (currently 12.03% coverage) using git commit dates or CMS automation
Fix 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links and implement CI/CD link checking to prevent regression
Resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 9.53% of pages (meta descriptions, canonical tags, language declarations)

limitations: External audit cannot verify functional correctness of API documentation or accuracy of technical content
Example reliability is estimated through heuristics; actual runtime validation requires environment access and execution
Link checking reflects point-in-time status; dynamic content and authentication-gated pages may not be fully assessed
API coverage detection at 85% confidence may undercount pages if non-standard documentation patterns are used
